objectives.text: Find Sava Rell and decide what remains.

stages.description: The smaller chapel keeps twelve candle places for eleven calcified dead. The mortuary has its own count.

stages.task: Find Sava Rell and decide what remains
stages.description: Hessa Marr kept twelve names. The road office buried Sava beneath the mortuary after he turned toward Hallowfen's bells.
You chose what the road will remember about the twelve.
